focus_items.title: Aymo-WH/algo-trading-bot
focus_items.summary: This repository is a Reinforcement Learning trading engine that throws away the clock. It samples the market like a machine, learns the underlying physics of different asset classes, and executes mathematically sized trades. (⭐ 2)

focus_items.title: koretty/fx-trading-env
focus_items.summary: A reinforcement learning-based FX trading simulator for developing and evaluating trading strategies. (⭐ 0)

focus_items.title: logan-the-engineer/logans-algorithmic-trading-platform
focus_items.summary: Modular algorithmic trading platform built with FastAPI. Bar-by-bar backtesting engine with two registered ML strategies: a RandomForest classifier (GoldSight) and a DQN reinforcement learning agent (AlphaTrader). (⭐ 0)

market_items.title: Morgan Stanley sets spot bitcoin ETF fee at 0.14%, undercutting every rival on the market
